subject: GRB 241207C: MASTER optical observations
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
C.Francile,  F. Podesta, R.Podesta, E. Gonzalez (Observatorio Astronomico Felix Aguilar (OAFA),
V.Lipunov, I.Panchenko, A.Kuznetsov, K.Zhirkov, E.Gorbovskoy, N.Tiurina,D.Vlasenko, A.Chasovnikov, V.Topolev,
P.Balanutsa, G.Antipov, A.Sankovich,M.Gulyaev, Ya.Kechin, V.Senik  (Lomonosov MSU),
A.Sosnovskij (CrAO RAS),
O.Gress, N.Budnev(ISU),
D.Buckley (SAAO),
R.Rebolo (The Instituto de Astrofisica de Canarias),
A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov (Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),
A. Gabovich, V.Yurkov (Blagoveschensk Educational StateUniversity)
L.Carrasco, J.R.Valdes, V.Chavushyan, V.M.Patino Alvarez,J.Martinez,A.R.Corella, L.H.Rodriguez (INAOE, Guillermo Haro Astrophysics Observatory),

MASTER-OAFA robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)
located in Argentina (OAFA observatory of San Juan National University)
was pointed to the MAXI GRB241207C error-box (trigger No 2412072220, GCN #38462, notice time 2024-12-08T00:13:03UT ) 8462 sec after trigger time at 2024-12-08 00:41:09 UT,with upper limit up to  18.6 mag. Observations started at twilight.

 The observations began at zenith distance = 61 deg. The sun  altitude  is -13.9 deg. Distance to Moon is 34deg., distance to Sun is 47deg.
The galactic latitude b = -31 deg., longitude l = 21 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here:
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2700028

We obtain the following upper limits.
